task_completion.description: Open the source commercial video in a media player or video editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for VLC Media Player or another video editing application open with 'energy_drink_commercial.mp4' loaded in the playlist, title bar, or media information window.

task_completion.description: Set the video segment to start at 0:25 and end at 0:40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the conversion/export settings dialog (e.g., VLC's 'Show more options' in the Open Media dialog) showing a start time of 25.000 and an end time/duration indicating 15 seconds.

task_completion.description: Disable the audio track for the exported videos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Audio codec' tab in the profile edition dialog with the 'Audio' or 'Keep original audio track' checkbox unchecked, ensuring no audio is exported.

task_completion.description: Scale the video to 1280x720 for the Jumbotron.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Video codec' -> 'Resolution' tab showing the width set to 1280 and height set to 720 for the jumbotron profile.

task_completion.description: Crop the video to 1920x120 at coordinates X:0, Y:480 for the Ribbon Board.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for video filter or cropping settings (e.g., VLC's Video Cropping filter) showing dimensions 1920x120 and top/bottom/left/right offsets corresponding to X:0, Y:480.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted videos to the stadium_ready directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog or file manager window showing 'jumbotron_ad.mp4' and 'ribbon_board_ad.mp4' inside the '/home/ga/Videos/stadium_ready/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create or update the deployment manifest JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor open showing a file named 'deployment.json' in '/home/ga/Documents/' containing references to the newly created jumbotron and ribbon board video files.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the video software to perform the formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with VLC or video editor dialog boxes (Convert/Save, Profile Edition) rather than just a terminal window running ffmpeg commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually exported the videos rather than creating empty mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a progress bar indicating video conversion/export, or file manager details showing the exported .mp4 files have a non-zero file size.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or edited the deployment manifest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor actively being used to type or format the JSON content for 'deployment.json', rather than simply moving a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source video: /home/ga/Videos/energy_drink_commercial.mp4. Target duration: exactly 15.0 seconds (0:25 to 0:40). Jumbotron output: /home/ga/Videos/stadium_ready/jumbotron_ad.mp4 (Resolution: 1280x720). Ribbon Board output: /home/ga/Videos/stadium_ready/ribbon_board_ad.mp4 (Resolution: 1920x120, Cropped at X:0, Y:480). Audio must be disabled. Manifest file: /home/ga/Documents/deployment.json.
